inputs.label: Maternal Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the mother at delivery

inputs.label: Previous CS Indication Recurrent
inputs.businessContext: 1 if previous cesarean indication is recurrent, 0 otherwise

inputs.label: Gestational Age
inputs.businessContext: Gestational age at delivery in weeks

inputs.label: Cervical Dilation
inputs.businessContext: Cervical dilation at admission in cm

formulas.primary: 100 / (1 + Math.exp(-(-3.5 + 0.05 * maternalAge + 0.1 * bmi - 1.2 * prevVaginalBirth + 1.5 * prevCSIndication + 0.2 * gestationalAge + 0.3 * cervicalDilation)))

breakdown: Risk Score (z): -3.5 + 0.05 * maternalAge + 0.1 * bmi - 1.2 * prevVaginalBirth + 1.5 * prevCSIndication + 0.2 * gestationalAge + 0.3 * cervicalDilation
